grid_strategy.why_choose_us: Bento 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A) with varied col-spans (e.g., 2x2, 1x2, 2x1) to break generic symmetric grids.
grid_strategy.subjects: Control Room Grid (Mode B) using 3-col structure with dense, functional spacing.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#0F2744]/10 shadow-sm
surfaces.cards: Neumorphic tactile variant: bg-white shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(15,39,68,0.06)] border border-[#0F2744]/5 rounded-xl
surfaces.footer: Deep Navy background (#0F2744) with Gold (#D4A93A) accents and white/70 text.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F2744] text-white hover:bg-[#1E4F8C] transition-colors rounded-sm px-8 py-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.accent: bg-[#D4A93A] text-[#0F2744] font-semibold hover:bg-[#c2982f] transition-colors rounded-sm px-8 py-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-2

hero.treatment: Premium 80vh layout. Left-aligned typography over a dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0F2744]/95 via-[#0F2744]/70 to-transparent) on the background image. Large Serif heading, Gold accent badges.

learning_methodology.treatment: Journey stepper layout. Use vertical line with Gold (#D4A93A) nodes. Active states pop, inactive states muted.

trust_bar.treatment: Editorial Ribbon marquee using react-fast-marquee. Pale blue/grey background, Dark Navy text. Huge spacing (gap-32) between items (CBSE, ISC, CUET, 10+ Years Experience).

demo_form.treatment: Clean layout using Shadcn Form inside a Neumorphic card. Input fields should have subtle borders (border-[#0F2744]/20) and focus to Gold ring.

floating_whatsapp.treatment: Fixed bottom-right circular button. Gold or WhatsApp Green, with strong drop-shadow and z-50.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg for Subject and Why Choose Us cards.
motion.page_load: Framer Motion fade and slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) for text elements in Hero.
motion.marquee: Continuous slow scroll for Trust Bar, ensuring it feels like a gentle stream.

images.description: Students concentrating on laptops while taking notes in a university lecture hall.
Confident young teacher holding a book in a sunlit classroom.
Elegant abstract fluid ink art in dark blue with shimmering gold accents.
Group of diverse classmates sitting at table and sharing opinions during studies.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on navy meets APCA/WCAG standards.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-book-demo-btn', data-testid='whatsapp-float-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts: 'Cormorant Garamond' (serif) and 'Poppins' (sans-serif). Configure Tailwind to use them as font-serif and font-sans.
Implement the 'Crystal Glass' header ensuring content isn't obscured.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactive pieces (Form, Accordion for FAQ) but customize them to match the premium 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic (remove heavy rounded corners, use rounded-sm).
Do NOT use 'Inter' font anywhere. Force 'Poppins' for body.
Integrate Framer Motion for scroll animations.
Ensure every CTA button and form input has a 'data-testid' attribute.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures to allow asymmetry, do not rely on rigid Shadcn Cards for the 'Why Choose Us' grid.
